S.FORM: == tingnaw == u zuma a kamu: u Hulam :電腦 u Amilika :computer u Lipun :コンピュータ
S.PHON: == tiŋnaw == u zuma a kamu: u ħur~ɾam :** u amir~ɾika :ʦomputər u r~ɾipun :******
